parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ref: $json.ref, variables: [{ key: 'N8N_ORCHESTRATED', value: 'true' }, { key: 'N8N_EXECUTION_ID', value: $execution.id }, { key: 'TRIGGERED_BY', value: 'n8n' }] }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ triggered: false, error: 'pipeline_create_failed', pipeline_id: null }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ pipeline_id: $json.pipeline_id, sha: $json.commit, conclusion: $json.conclusion, ref: $json.ref, source: 'gitlab-ci', workflow: 'ci-main-pipeline', passed: $json.passed, failed: $json.failed, total: $json.total, duration_seconds: $json.duration_seconds }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ triggered: true, pipeline_id: $('poll-pipeline').first().json.pipeline_id, status: $('poll-pipeline').first().json.pipelineStatus, conclusion: $json.conclusion || 'unknown' }) }}
